blocking_findings.description: wp-foundation has 54 tasks; consider decomposition into wp-foundation-protocols + wp-foundation-impls

escalation_reason: Round-2 PLAN_REVIEW achieved 2-vendor convergence (claude_code + gemini, with codex unavailable due to OpenAI capacity). 16 distinct findings synthesized; 12 auto-fixed in iteration 2 commit, 3 rejected as already-addressed or over-cautious. 1 blocking finding (C12 wp-foundation decomposition) is an architectural choice escalated to human decision. Convergence verification: gemini caught 4 high+critical findings claude self-review missed (D3 return-type, Protocol lifecycle, D10/D27 contradiction, tmp-file race) — strong evidence of cross-vendor value.
